parameters.name: list_articles
parameters.description: List articles (products and services) from Lexware. Parameters: page (page number starting at 0, optional, default 0), type ('PRODUCT' or 'SERVICE', optional, lists all if empty)

parameters.name: get_article
parameters.description: Get details of a specific article by ID. Parameters: id (article UUID, required)

parameters.name: create_article
parameters.description: Create a new article (product or service). Parameters: title (article name, required), type ('PRODUCT' or 'SERVICE', optional, default 'SERVICE'), unitName (unit of measure, optional, default 'Stück'), netPrice (net price as number, optional, default 0), taxRate (tax rate percentage, optional, default 19), description (optional), articleNumber (optional), gtin (EAN/barcode, optional)

parameters.name: update_article
parameters.description: Update an existing article. IMPORTANT: Use get_article first to get the current version number. Parameters: id (article UUID, required), version (current version number for optimistic locking, required), title (article name, required), type ('PRODUCT' or 'SERVICE', optional), unitName (optional), netPrice (optional), taxRate (optional), description (optional), articleNumber (optional)

parameters.name: delete_article
parameters.description: Delete an article by ID. Parameters: id (article UUID, required)

parameters.name: list_quotations
parameters.description: List quotations (Angebote). Parameters: page (page number, optional, default 0), status (filter by status: 'draft', 'open', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'expired', optional)

value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'Filter by status: draft, open, accepted, rejected, expired (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_quotation
parameters.description: Get details of a specific quotation by ID, including line items and totals. Parameters: id (quotation UUID, required)

parameters.name: create_quotation
parameters.description: Create a new quotation. Parameters: lineItems (JSON array of items, required, e.g. [{"name":"Beratung","quantity":2,"unitPrice":150,"taxRate":19}]), contactId (Lexware contact UUID, optional), voucherDate (YYYY-MM-DD, optional, default today), finalize ('true' to finalize immediately, optional, default draft), expirationDate (YYYY-MM-DD, optional), introduction (intro text, optional), remark (closing text, optional)

value.finalize: ={{ $fromAI('finalize', 'true to finalize, false for draft (default: false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_invoices
parameters.description: List invoices (Rechnungen). Parameters: page (page number, optional, default 0), status (filter by status: 'draft', 'open', 'paidoff', 'voided', optional)

value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'Filter by status: draft, open, paidoff, voided (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_invoice
parameters.description: Get details of a specific invoice by ID, including line items, totals, and payment conditions. Parameters: id (invoice UUID, required)

parameters.name: create_invoice
parameters.description: Create a new invoice. Parameters: lineItems (JSON array of items, required, e.g. [{"name":"Beratung","quantity":2,"unitPrice":150,"taxRate":19}]), contactId (Lexware contact UUID, optional), voucherDate (YYYY-MM-DD, optional, default today), finalize ('true' to finalize immediately, optional, default draft), introduction (intro text, optional), remark (closing text, optional)

value.finalize: ={{ $fromAI('finalize', 'true to finalize, false for draft (default: false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_invoice_from_quotation
parameters.description: Create an invoice from an existing quotation. Parameters: quotation_id (quotation UUID, required), finalize ('true' to finalize immediately, optional, default draft)

value.finalize: ={{ $fromAI('finalize', 'true to finalize, false for draft (default: false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: upload_file
parameters.description: Upload a voucher file (receipt/document) to Lexware. Parameters: file_base64 (file content as base64 string, required), file_name (filename with extension like 'receipt.pdf', optional, default 'document.pdf')

parameters.name: list_vouchers
parameters.description: List all vouchers (invoices, quotations, credit notes, etc.) with optional filters. Parameters: page (page number, optional, default 0), voucherType (filter by type: 'invoice', 'quotation', 'creditnote', 'deliverynote', optional), status (filter by status, optional)
